content:
Hello DEV Community! 👋 Just started my Front-End Journey from Scratch!

Hey everyone! 👋

I'm Vinamra, and I am super excited to join the DEV community today! By day, I handle administrative tasks as a Junior Assistant, but by night, I dive straight into the world of pixels and logic.

I have recently started learning Front-End Web Development from absolute scratch, and my current sandbox is VS Code.

🛠️ What I am currently focusing on:

•
HTML5 & CSS3: Mastered the basics, now trying to make my layouts look clean, modern, and highly aesthetic.

•
JavaScript: Just stepped into the world of interactivity and logic. (DOM manipulation is next on my list!)

🚀 Why I joined DEV:

I joined this amazing platform to document my learning journey, read insightful tutorials from experienced devs, and hopefully share my own small wins and mini-projects as I build them.

I’d love to connect with fellow learners and mentors here!

Drop a comment below: What is one piece of advice you wish you knew when you first started learning HTML/CSS/JS?

Happy coding! 💻⚡
